sigWerErrors.reason: 'thẻ' (card) and 'thể' (form/body) are different words; in this context, 'thẻ tạm' means 'temporary card', so using 'thể' changes the meaning but the sentence is still somewhat understandable.
'hiện tại' means 'present (time)', while 'điện thoại' means 'telephone'; this substitution changes the meaning of the sentence significantly, making it incoherent in context.
